name: Lengoo
description: AI-assisted localization with translation APIs and CAT pipeline for devs.

seo.title: Lengoo — Localization / Translation API
seo.meta_description: Lengoo: AI-assisted localization with translation APIs and CAT pipeline for devs.

when_to_use: AI-assisted CAT pipeline for dev team localization
Translation API for automated content localization
Human-AI hybrid workflow for technical documentation
Fast localization turnaround for agile development cycles

pros: Trained MT with human post-editing in one pipeline
REST API fits into CI and CAT workflows
cons: Company went through insolvency, future uncertain
Limited public pricing and case studies
Smaller language scope than global LSPs
review.verdict: Interesting AI-plus-human hybrid, but vendor stability is a real question before committing production workloads.
review.best_for: Dev teams comfortable with smaller vendors for German-English technical translation
review.not_for: Mission-critical localization where vendor continuity matters
